commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The branch updates `oxlint-tsgolint` from 0.22.1 to 0.23.0 in `package.json` and refreshes `pnpm-lock.yaml`.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR defect: the submitted diff directly shows runtime lockfile entries changing while `package.json` only requests an `oxlint-tsgolint` devDependency bump.
commands.review_followup: A focused repair can preserve the intended devDependency bump while removing unrelated runtime lockfile drift.

target.title: chore(deps-dev): bump oxlint-tsgolint from 0.22.1 to 0.23.0
target.body:
Bumps [oxlint-tsgolint](https://github.com/oxc-project/tsgolint) from 0.22.1 to 0.23.0.
Release notes

Sourced from oxlint-tsgolint's releases.

v0.23.0

What's Changed

  • chore(deps): update crate-ci/typos action to v1.45.2 by @​renovate[bot] in oxc-project/tsgolint#915
  • feat: add skill for upgrading typescript-go by @​camc314 in oxc-project/tsgolint#918
  • chore(deps): update pnpm to v10.33.2 by @​renovate[bot] in oxc-project/tsgolint#921
  • chore: update typescript-go submodule by @​camc314 in oxc-project/tsgolint#922
  • fix: attach tsconfig path to diagnostics by @​camc314 in oxc-project/tsgolint#923
  • fix(prefer-nullish-coalescing): parenthesize mixed logical fixes by @​camc314 in oxc-project/tsgolint#924
  • tests(return-await): cover non-async arrow functions by @​camc314 in oxc-project/tsgolint#926
  • chore(deps): update github.com/go-json-experiment/json digest to b6187a3 by @​renovate[bot] in oxc-project/tsgolint#927
  • chore(deps): update github actions by @​renovate[bot] in oxc-project/tsgolint#928
  • chore(deps): update crate-ci/typos action to v1.46.0 by @​renovate[bot] in oxc-project/tsgolint#929
  • chore(deps): update module github.com/dlclark/regexp2 to v2 by @​renovate[bot] in oxc-project/tsgolint#930
  • chore: update typescript-go submodule by @​camc314 in oxc-project/tsgolint#931
  • chore(deps): update typescript-go digest to 48e2953 by @​renovate[bot] in oxc-project/tsgolint#933
  • chore(deps): update typescript-go digest to 5eb880f by @​renovate[bot] in oxc-project/tsgolint#936
  • fix(no-misused-promises): handle empty JSX attributes by @​camc314 in oxc-project/tsgolint#938
  • fix(no-unsafe-enum-comparison): flag string literal unions by @​camc314 in oxc-project/tsgolint#937
  • chore(deps): update typescript-go digest to e1f8f97 by @​renovate[bot] in oxc-project/tsgolint#939
  • chore(deps): update typescript-go digest to 092b34f by @​renovate[bot] in oxc-project/tsgolint#940
  • chore: configure typescript-go renovate schedule by @​camc314 in oxc-project/tsgolint#941
  • chore(deps): update github actions by @​renovate[bot] in oxc-project/tsgolint#945
  • chore(deps): update dependency dprint-typescript to v0.96.0 by @​renovate[bot] in oxc-project/tsgolint#947
  • chore(deps): update gomod by @​renovate[bot] in oxc-project/tsgolint#946
  • chore(deps): update crate-ci/typos action to v1.46.1 by @​renovate[bot] in oxc-project/tsgolint#948
  • fix(prefer-nullish-coalescing): emit suggestion over fix by @​camc314 in oxc-project/tsgolint#951
  • chore: update packageManager to pnpm 11.0.4 by @​Boshen in oxc-project/tsgolint#953
  • chore: update typescript-go submodule by @​camc314 in oxc-project/tsgolint#955
  • fix(no-nullable-type-assertion-style): use suggestion instead of fix by @​camc314 in oxc-project/tsgolint#956
  • docs: Update Go version requirement to 1.26 in CONTRIBUTING.md. by @​connorshea in oxc-project/tsgolint#957
  • fix: allow safe promise intersection members by @​camc314 in oxc-project/tsgolint#959
  • ci: switch security workflow to ubuntu-latest by @​Boshen in oxc-project/tsgolint#962
  • chore(deps): update dependency vitest to v4.1.6 by @​renovate[bot] in oxc-project/tsgolint#963
  • chore(deps): update module github.com/dlclark/regexp2/v2 to v2.0.3 by @​renovate[bot] in oxc-project/tsgolint#964
  • chore(deps): update dependency dprint-markdown to v0.22.0 by @​renovate[bot] in oxc-project/tsgolint#965
  • chore(deps): update github actions by @​renovate[bot] in oxc-project/tsgolint#966
  • perf(no-unnecessary-type-parameters): stop counting settled candidates by @​camc314 in oxc-project/tsgolint#967
  • chore: add dprint to pnpm allowBuilds by @​camc314 in oxc-project/tsgolint#968

Full Changelog: https://github.com/oxc-project/tsgolint/compare/v0.22.1...v0.23.0

Commits
  • 0e575fa chore: add dprint to pnpm allowBuilds (#968)
  • bb8886b perf(no-unnecessary-type-parameters): stop counting settled candidates (#967)
  • 90be7b2 chore(deps): update github actions (#966)
  • cdae358 chore(deps): update dependency dprint-markdown to v0.22.0 (#965)
  • d356c9e chore(deps): update module github.com/dlclark/regexp2/v2 to v2.0.3 (#964)
  • 7cba6be chore(deps): update dependency vitest to v4.1.6 (#963)
  • 1dcd2a6 ci: switch security workflow to ubuntu-latest (#962)
  • b4f6624 fix: allow safe promise intersection members (#959)
  • 233eeb3 docs: Update Go version requirement to 1.26 in CONTRIBUTING.md. (#957)
  • 8bd37ab fix(no-nullable-type-assertion-style): use suggestion instead of fix (#956)
  • Additional commits viewable in compare view
